description: Detects race condition risks in C++: class methods that modify shared state without mutex lock_guard, unsynchronized containers accessed from multiple threads. Simplified from Rust per D-07: matches field_declaration nodes in class bodies broadly (cannot verify mutex presence, method body mutation, or thread context without cross-node analysis).

flag.message: Class field declaration detected -- verify classes with mutable shared state (non-const fields) synchronize all mutating methods with std::lock_guard, std::unique_lock, or std::scoped_lock to prevent data races. Precision reduced: flags all class fields, not just those in classes with mutex fields.
